category_sources: source_facts.description says "IBM 3270 terminal emulator for the X Window System and Windows"; official site describes x3270 as a suite of 3270 terminal emulation tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is x3270; current_curation.display-name is x3270.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official x3270 site; official documentation page points to the x3270 Wiki for up-to-date documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge x3270 project exposes the active Code repository and links back to the x3270 website.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IBM 3270 terminal emulation; official SourceForge summary lists TN3270E emulation features.
